texto: I find myself making excuses for this kind of bullying behavior. Not everyone has been to college, learned trans 101, studied queer theory... But this is unfair to myself and other trans people. I've come to realize that understanding me isn't a matter of being an intellectual. Likewise, one doesn't have to be a radical to respect my feelings. Decent people consider how their comments affect others.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Elliot Deline sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “I find myself making excuses for this kind of bullying behavior. Not everyone has been to college…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, acceptance, queer, útil em momentos de termino e queer.
